title: 50-lesson milestone: speed test
description: Halfway through the course — pure speed check on real prose
text: Fifty lessons in. You started with home row and now you can write anything. Push your speed today. Read ahead, trust your hands, and stay smooth — accuracy stays at ninety-three percent.

tips.text: If you pass 45 WPM here, you're on track for 80+ by Block 7

character_tips.anna: 🎯 50-lesson milestone! You're officially halfway. Look at the WPM number — that's earned.
character_tips.maxim: Halfway checkpoint. Track your number here — Block 5 will push it higher.
character_tips.klavochka: Half a journey, my star ⭐ Look how far you've come!
